narrative:
Precinct Buckskin North (precinct in Ross County) has 540 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.3 percentage points.
